title: Projects table JSON
description: JSON Schema for the copied projects table payload.

rows.description: Ordered rows copied from the grouped projects table.

projectName.description: Project name shown in the table.

sessionCount.description: Number of sessions in the project group.

requestTokensTotal.description: Total input tokens across the project group.

responseTokensTotal.description: Total output tokens across the project group.

cacheReadTokensTotal.description: Total cache-read tokens across the project group.

cacheCreationTokensTotal.description: Total cache-write tokens across the project group.

createdAt.description: Earliest session creation time in the group.

lastUsedAt.description: Most recent activity time in the group.
